consensus_summary: Nordstrom's kids' yoga mats are generally well-regarded for quality construction and appealing designs that appeal to children. Users appreciate the non-toxic materials and decent thickness for comfort. However, some reviewers note they're premium-priced compared to alternatives, and durability varies with heavy use.
pros: Attractive, colorful designs that appeal to children
Non-toxic, safe materials suitable for kids
Good cushioning and comfort for young users
cons: Higher price point than comparable competitors
Can show wear and marking with heavy use
Limited size options for different age groups
Scent may be noticeable when new
Care instructions require hand washing only
